caption: The video shows a man driving a vehicle, likely a car or a van, through a rural area with dry, open land and sparse vegetation visible through the window. The man appears focused on the road ahead, with his hands firmly on the steering wheel. He is wearing a light-colored shirt and seems to be engaged in conversation, as indicated by the subtitles that read "and I work for IOM." The setting suggests he might be on a work-related trip or mission, possibly involving travel to remote locations. The overall atmosphere of the video conveys a sense of purpose and dedication to his task.
